steps.title: Contrast old and new output
steps.content: The passage claims newer offshore wind turbines often outperform older models. It then compares a 1998 farm producing about 0.6 MW per turbine with a 2021 farm producing about 10 MW per turbine.

steps.title: Reject cause and concession
steps.content: Choice A signals concession, but no opposing point is being granted. Choice B signals cause, though the older farm does not cause the newer farm's output. Choice D signals eventual timing rather than comparison. The remaining transition highlights the performance difference. The answer is C.
